subcodes.first_line: O ye sincere servants of the Blessed Beauty! The Spiritual Assembly of that region is a rose-garden of the Lord. Therefore no soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان صادق جمال مبارک محفل روحانی آن سامان گلشن حضرت یزدانست لهذا نفسی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @scarcity of receptive souls
